finding.triage_reasoning: Reality: get_dead_code_tools() at L391-393 has zero callers across 6 swept files. The same migration pattern from get_*_tools() to get_*_tool_definitions() applies here. No cross-file reference to get_dead_code_tools was found. Significance: Dead legacy wrapper clutters the API surface. Actionability: Remove it.
finding.suggested_fix: Remove the get_dead_code_tools() function; consumers should use get_dead_code_tool_definitions() instead.
